name: max4c-dahso
description: Dahso app plugin marketplace — bundles the Dahso workflow plugin and the max general skills plugin so users get both with one marketplace add.

plugins.name: dahso
plugins.description: Dahso workflow skills — flow, ticket, go, prep, catchup, and supporting tools for running the Dahso app as a project management system.

plugins.name: max
plugins.description: General building skills — grill-me, write-prd, tdd, and more. Project-agnostic skills that enhance any workflow. Required companion for the dahso plugin's active spec grilling.
